scope_summary: Find one real FireFlow ticket mutation, request progression, approval, implementation, or review branch on the current lab now that activation is confirmed. Prefer a minute where FireFlow logs move beyond Authentication, UserSession, or GetUserInfo into request- or ticket-specific work, and correlate that same minute across Apache FireFlow or AFF access, fireflow.log, aff-boot or neighboring microservice logs, PostgreSQL, and any broker evidence that is actually available. Capture exact timestamps, destination names, request or ticket identifiers if present, and decide whether the branch stays synchronous, becomes ms-batch or config-propagation centered, or finally justifies earlier ActiveMQ promotion. Do not mutate appliance state.
